title: baccharidastrum triplinervium
intro: Baccharidastrum triplinervium, also known as Triplinervia, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family. It is a shrub native to South America and is used for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. Baccharidastrum triplinervium is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
